untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires candlestick formation pattern recognition (Breakaway pattern identification) and detection of 'long decline' regime context that cannot be expressed with point-in-time indicator values. The overhead resistance level and valley detection also require historical pattern analysis beyond available indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture key signal concepts: white candle with large body (body > atr_14) and upward breakout (close > prev_close). However, the core pattern identification of 'Breakaway' formation, detection of preceding long decline, and resistance level from previous valleys requires pattern recognition logic not available in the allowed indicator set. Original pattern success rate of 45/103 rank suggests moderate reliability. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source were converted to reversal signal (close < prev_close).
